resume: CONSULTANT       Objective    Enthusiastic Pharmacist with a variety of experience in community pharmacy including compounding and managerial experience.  Enjoys multitasking by working with other healthcare professionals and insurance providers to ensure optimal patient outcomes.  Thrives on working in a team environment to provide an efficient and positive patient experience.      Licenses    In good standing with both Texas and Idaho State Boards of Pharmacy and a certified immunizer.      Professional Experience     09/2016   to   Current     Consultant    Company Name   －   City  ,   State    Experience in ACHC accreditation and compounding product development.  Pharmacy workflow solutions and marketing strategies.  Insurance billing knowledge including specialty medications, expertise in State Board inspections and license reciprocity process.       02/2016   to   08/2016     Pharmacist in Charge    Company Name   －   City  ,   State    Set up a newly purchased pharmacy that specialized in non-sterile compounding.  Created a logical and efficient system to process prescriptions, compounding, product verification, and shipping arrangements.  Developed many compounded medications such as topical analgesics, scar diminishing creams, and a variety of metabolic supplements.  Enjoyed managing a team to promote a positive and efficient work environment.       10/2015   to   02/2016     Staff Pharmacist    Company Name   －   City  ,   State    Gained initial non-sterile compounding experience.  Involved with processing, verifying prescriptions, and product verification.  Learned record keeping for compounding ingredients, batch and patient specific compounding.  Worked to create optimal workflow, product marketing, and develop business.          06/2012   to   10/2015     Staff Pharmacist    Company Name   －   City  ,   State    Pharmacist with diverse experience within the company.  Staffed at a high volume 24 hour store and a clinic store.  As staff pharmacist helped to manage operations, participated in drug utilization review and medication therapy management for multiple stores.  Promoted immunizations and enjoyed patient interaction and counseling.        Skills      Pharmacy operations  Prescription compounding and dispensing  Inventory control  Non-sterile compounded medication development  Business development   Team building    Patient counseling  Microsoft Office   Intercom Plus  BestRx        Education and Training     2012     Doctor of Pharmacy      University of the Incarnate Word   －   City  ,   State             2003     Bachelor of Science  :   Economics    Texas A&M University   －   City  ,   State

CONSULTANT

Objective
Motivated pharmacist with extensive community pharmacy experience, including compounding and managerial responsibilities. Skilled at multitasking and collaborating with other healthcare professionals and insurance providers to achieve optimal patient outcomes. Excels in team environments, delivering an efficient workflow and a positive patient experience.

Licenses
Active licenses in good standing with the Texas and Idaho State Boards of Pharmacy; certified immunizer.

Professional Experience
09/2016 to Current
Consultant
Company Name － City, State
Experienced with ACHC accreditation and compounded product development. Implemented pharmacy workflow improvements and marketing strategies. Possesses insurance billing expertise, including specialty medications; adept with State Board inspections and the license reciprocity process.

02/2016 to 08/2016
Pharmacist in Charge
Company Name － City, State
Established operations for a newly acquired pharmacy specializing in non-sterile compounding. Designed a logical and efficient system for prescription processing, compounding, product verification, and shipping coordination. Formulated numerous compounded medications such as topical analgesics, scar-diminishing creams, and a variety of metabolic supplements. Enjoyed leading a team and fostering a positive, efficient work environment.

10/2015 to 02/2016
Staff Pharmacist
Company Name － City, State
Acquired foundational experience in non-sterile compounding. Participated in processing and verifying prescriptions, along with product verification. Learned record-keeping for compounding ingredients, batch preparations, and patient-specific compounding. Contributed to optimizing workflow, product marketing, and business development.

06/2012 to 10/2015
Staff Pharmacist
Company Name － City, State
Pharmacist with varied experience within the company. Staffed both a high-volume 24-hour store and a clinic location. As a staff pharmacist, helped manage operations and participated in drug utilization review and medication therapy management across multiple stores. Promoted immunizations and valued patient interaction and counseling.

Skills
Pharmacy operations  Compounding and dispensing prescriptions  Inventory control  Development of non-sterile compounded medications  Business development  Team building  Patient counseling  Microsoft Office  Intercom Plus  BestRx

Education and Training
2012  Doctor of Pharmacy
University of the Incarnate Word － City, State

2003  Bachelor of Science: Economics
Texas A&M University － City, State
